coding_rationale: Direct somatic responses; minimal cognitive mediation; emotion-to-body pathway without reflective integration
Tracks somatic state and symptom burden; not cognitively reframed health appraisal
Simple action-level outcomes; stimulus-driven habits; coded dot but flagged for sensitivity

domain_desc: Depression / anxiety / negative affect / general distress
coding_rationale: Outcome measures index single-valence distress dimensions (BDI/STAI/negative affect scales); measurement structure treats emotion as unidimensional symptom severity without relational or contextual components

domain_desc: Intrusive thoughts / avoidance / hyperarousal / maladaptive schemas
coding_rationale: Outcome measures (IES intrusion/avoidance subscales and maladaptive schema inventories) assess isolated symptom dimensions without cross-domain integration; items are structurally independent

domain_desc: Well-being / life satisfaction / positive affect / flourishing
coding_rationale: Outcome measures (SWLS/positive affect scales/flourishing indices) require respondents to integrate evaluations across life domains; items reference multi-dimensional appraisals

domain_desc: Relationship quality / social support / social adjustment
coding_rationale: Multi-dimensional integration of emotional signals within relational contexts

domain_desc: Post-traumatic growth / benefit finding / sense of coherence / coping self-efficacy
coding_rationale: Outcome measures (PTGI/BFS/SOC) structurally require cross-domain integration; e.g. PTGI items reference relationships and personal strength and new possibilities and spiritual change simultaneously
